# services.buildkite-agents

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.buildkite-agents`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.buildkite-agents` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of buildkite agents. The attribute key is combined with the hostname and a unique integer to create the final agent name. This can be overridden by setting the `name` attribute. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.dataDir` | `string` | The workdir for the agent |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable this buildkite agent |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra lines to be added verbatim to the configuration file. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.extraGroups` | `list of string` | Groups the user for this buildkite agent should belong to |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks` | `attribute set of strings concatenated with "\n"` | "Agent" hooks to install. See <https://buildkite.com/docs/agent/v3/hooks> for possible options. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooksPath` | `absolute path` | Path to the directory storing the hooks. Consider using {option}`services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.<name>` instead. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.name` | `string` | The name of the agent as seen in the buildkite dashboard. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.package` | `package` | The buildkite-agent package to use. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.privateSshKeyPath` | `null or absolute path` | OpenSSH private key A run-time path to the key file, which is supposed to be provisioned outside of Nix store. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.runtimePackages` | `list of package` | Add programs to the buildkite-agent environment |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.shell` | `string` | Command that buildkite-agent 3 will execute when it spawns a shell. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.tags` | `attribute set of (string or list of string)` | Tags for the agent. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.tokenPath` | `absolute path` | The token from your Buildkite "Agents" page. A run-time path to the token file, which is supposed to be provisioned outside of Nix store. |
